specs.title: should display SocialInteractions component at product level
should display ReactionsList for product reactions
should show login prompt when clicking reaction button (unauthenticated)
can view existing reactions from other users
should navigate to comments tab when clicking product-level comment button
should display SocialInteractions for each comment
